pages.text: It is said that one of the symbols of a certain nameless kingdom was a type of gong, and you have managed to create a replica. The distorted ancient sound can still stir the ruins—summoning a Desert Progeny from amidst the rubble to respond to the source of the noise.
By placing a Weakening Focus onto a gong, you can mimic the sound of the ancient gong. While retaining the Weakening Focus's original function, it can also barely rouse the interest of the desert.
